title: dryopteris hirtirachis
intro: Dryopteris hirtirachis, also known as the hairy leathery fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Dryopteris hirtirachis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris hirtirachis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is believed to exhibit its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
